messageTemplatePolicy: diagnostic messages are canonical producer inputs; Story 9-5 validates that each published page links to the registry-owned message template and does not invent diagnostic IDs or lifecycle policy.
docsStubProsePolicy: published diagnostic prose must be actionable for the owning package and lifecycle. Generated section scaffolds are not accepted as complete published guidance.

externalBoundaries.updatePolicy: Changes require Story 11.7 or explicit registry governance review.
externalBoundaries.rationale: EventStore is a root-level submodule with a dedicated HFC3000-HFC3999 range.

externalBoundaries.updatePolicy: A future Tenants diagnostic range requires an explicit registry range allocation story.
externalBoundaries.rationale: Tenants is an external boundary but currently emits no FrontComposer-owned diagnostics.

diagnostics.title: QueryRequest.Filter is deprecated
diagnostics.messageTemplate: What: QueryRequest.Filter is deprecated. Expected: Use QueryRequest.ColumnFilters for column-scoped filter expressions. Got: Legacy QueryRequest.Filter metadata was used. Fix: Move filter state to ColumnFilters before the removal release. DocsLink: https://hexalith.github.io/FrontComposer/diagnostics/HFC0001

diagnostics.title: Customization manifest is invalid
diagnostics.messageTemplate: What: Customization manifest is invalid. Expected: Shell runtime customization manifests match the SourceTools descriptor contract. Got: A manifest failed validation before it could be trusted. Fix: Regenerate or correct the manifest and keep evidence sanitized. DocsLink: https://hexalith.github.io/FrontComposer/diagnostics/HFC1601
diagnostics.lifecycleNote: Cross-package emission: HFC1601 is allocated in the SourceTools numeric range but emitted at runtime exclusively from the Shell project. The structured allowedExceptions.crossPackageRange row records owner package, consuming package, numeric-range owner, canonical help link, rationale, approving story, and provenance so this one stable ID does not become a general bypass.
